name: Munnar
description: Munnar is one of India's most beautiful hill stations, famous for tea plantations, waterfalls, mist-covered mountains and pleasant weather throughout the year.

name: Ooty
description: Ooty is known for its rolling hills, botanical gardens, scenic train ride and cool climate, making it one of South India's top tourist destinations.

name: Goa
description: Goa is India's most popular beach destination, offering vibrant nightlife, Portuguese heritage, adventure sports and beautiful coastline.

name: Kodaikanal
description: Kodaikanal is known as the Princess of Hill Stations, with forests, waterfalls, lakes and breathtaking viewpoints.

name: Leh Ladakh
description: Leh Ladakh offers dramatic landscapes, high-altitude passes, monasteries and thrilling road-trip adventures.
